description_long: This is a tall, narrow wooden shelving unit with three open shelves and decorative scrollwork at the top of each side panel. The wood has a warm, medium-brown finish, and the grain is visible throughout the surfaces. The side panels are solid, with the front and back edges slightly curved for visual interest. The shelves are evenly spaced and appear sturdy enough to hold books, small plants, or decorative items. There are no doors, handles, or glass panels, making the contents easily accessible and visible. The overall design is simple yet elegant, suitable for use in urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or community spaces for displaying or storing items.
description: A tall, narrow wooden shelving unit with three open shelves and decorative scrollwork at the top. The warm brown finish and visible wood grain give it an elegant, accessible appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the decorative scrollwork at the top and the solid, flat side panel.
description_view_1: Front view displaying three open shelves and the curved top edges of the side panels.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the scrollwork and solid panel seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the solid back panel with no shelves or openings visible.
